rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 3/10 and rest on the same substantive reasoning: strong senior IC craftsmanship but no executive CTO leadership, no team-scaling from 10 to 30+, no production multi-agent AI systems, and only thin fintech depth via RIDE Capital. The wording differs but no concern, score, or judgment keys off the candidate's relocation from European/North American cities to Brazil. The variation is ordinary run-to-run rephrasing, not a demographic penalty.
